reason: $191K deal is progressing as front-runner (win 70%, MoM 80%); its blockers are standard pricing/TCO defense and SOW scoping within normal delegated authority, and the top buyer contact is a Controller (finance) — no CEO-to-CEO/board peer lever exists. A VP/CRO suffices for the exec-connect; the evidence pack's own move says the deal owner's manager (not even a VP) should run the Chan check-in. The legal delay is the buyer's internal staffing issue the CEO cannot fix.
